name: Checkerboard Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup + 1 tablespoon Butter or margarine, softened and divided
1 package DUNCAN HINES Moist Deluxe Fudge Marble Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 3/4 cup butter, egg yolks, and vanilla extract in a large bowl. Beat at low speed with an electric mixer until blended. Set aside the cocoa packet from the mix. Gradually add the cake mix and blend well.
2. Divide the dough into half. To one half of the dough, add the cocoa packet and the remaining 1 tablespoon butter. Knead until well blended and chocolate colored.
3. Roll out yellow dough between two pieces of waxed paper into a 6-inch square. Repeat with chocolate dough. Remove top pieces of waxed paper from yellow and chocolate doughs. Cut each square into twelve 1/2-inch wide strips.
4. To assemble, place one strip chocolate dough on plastic wrap. Brush the edge with beaten egg. Place one strip yellow dough next to the chocolate dough. Brush the edge with egg. Repeat with a second chocolate strip, egg, and a second yellow strip to make the first row. Brush the top of the row with egg. Prepare the second row by stacking strips on the first row, alternating yellow over chocolate strips. Brush the edges and top of each strip with egg. Repeat for the third row to complete one checkerboard bar. Repeat with remaining strips to make a second bar. Cover with plastic wrap. Refrigerate 1 hour or until firm enough to slice.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease baking sheets.
6. Cut checkerboard bars into 1/4-inch slices. Place the slices 2 inches apart on greased baking sheets. Bake at 350°F for 7-9 minutes or until edges are light golden brown. Cool 1 minute on baking sheets. Remove to cooling racks. Cool completely. Store in airtight containers.
Makes 4 dozen cookies.
